title: Thoothuvala Ilai Arachi Lyrics Thaai Manasu
stanzas: <div>Thoothuvala Ilai Arachi Lyrics Thaai Manasu

Thoothuvala ilai arachi
thondayilathaan nenaichi
maaman kitta pesam poren
mani kanakkaa.(2)

thoondaa mani velakka
thoondi vittu eriyavachi
un mugatha pakka poren
naal kanakkaa.

andha indhiran chandhiranum
maaman vandha
endhirichi nikkanum.

andha rambaiyum oor vasiyum
maamanukku thondugal
senjidanum.

naan kaathaagi ooththaagi
maamana thazhuvi kattikanum

Thoothuvala ilai arachi
thondayilathaan nenaichi
maaman kitta pesam poren
mani kanakkaa.

thoondaa mani velakka
thoondi vittu eriyavachi
un mugatha pakka poren
naal kanakkaa.

naalthorum kaathirunthen
naane thavamirundhen
unakkaagathaan kannae
unakkaagathaan

naankooda manasukulla
aasai valarthukitten
una paarthuthaan maamaa
una paarthuthaan

oada muththuna kirukku
moththamum thelliya
muraiyidalaamo.

suttura kannula
sikkuna enna
sirai idalaamo.

eththana naal
ippadi naan yenguradhu
pottu vachi poo mudikkum
naal irukku.

Thoothuvala ilai arachi
thondayilathaan nenaichi
maaman kitta pesam poren
mani kanakkaa.

thoondaa mani velakka
thoondi vittu eriyavachi
un mugatha pakka poren
naal kanakkaa.

Oor thoongum velaiyilayum
naan thoonga ponathilla
unnaalathaan kannae
unnaalathaan.

yaar paecha kettaalum
en kadhil kaetpathellaam
un paeruthaan niththam
un paeruthaan

ye iththana nenappum
enmelirundhu etti pogalamo.
kattupaadirundhu
kattikkum munne
otti kollalaamo.

muththamitta
mosam enna undaagum.
sathamittaa
un nelama ennaagum.

Thoothuvala ilai arachi
thondayilathaan nenaichi
maaman kitta pesam poren
mani kanakkaa.

thoondaa mani velakka
thoondi vittu eriyavachi
un mugatha pakka poren
naal kanakkaa.

andha indhiran chandhiranum
maaman vandha
endhirichi nikkanum.

andha rambaiyum oor vasiyum
mayilikku thondugal
senjidanum.

naan kaathaagi ooththaagi
maamana thazhuvi kattikanum

Thoothuvala ilai arachi
thondayilathaan nenaichi
maaman kitta pesam poren
mani kanakkaa.

thoondaa mani velakka
thoondi vittu eriyavachi
un mugatha pakka poren
naal kanakkaa.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses feelings of longing and emotional turmoil, reflecting the complexities of love.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Thaai Manasu, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonist's emotional struggles.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of Mano and S. Janaki.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Thoothuvala Ilai Arachi was composed by Deva.

When was this song released?

This song was released on December 2, 1994.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thoothuvala Ilai Arachi, the poignant lyrics and soulful melodies evoke a deep sense of nostalgia and longing. The song beautifully captures the emotional struggles faced by the characters in Thaai Manasu, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema. With its heartfelt delivery by Mano and S. Janaki, it resonates with anyone who has experienced love and heartache. The composition by Deva adds a timeless quality, ensuring its place in the hearts of listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thoothuvala Ilai Arachi from Thaai Manasu is a soulful melody that captures the essence of longing and nostalgia. The enchanting voices of Mano and S. Janaki, combined with Deva's masterful composition, create a timeless experience. Dive into this emotional journey that resonates with anyone who has ever felt the pangs of love and loss.
stanzaMeanings: I am thinking about talking to my uncle about the small things.
I will light the lamp and look at your face on the day of the calculation.
That Indiran and Chandiran, my uncle should come and sit.
That rambai and the village should be offered to my uncle.
I should hug my uncle as a friend.
I will light the lamp and look at your face on the day of the calculation.
I will light the lamp and look at your face on the day of the calculation.
I have been waiting for days, I have been in penance for you, my eyes are for you.
I have grown desires in my heart, just by seeing you, uncle.
No matter who speaks, my story will always be about you.
Will the thoughts rise from my eyes and escape? Will they be caught before they fall?
What will happen if I kiss? What will happen to your sound?
I will light the lamp and look at your face on the day of the calculation.
I will light the lamp and look at your face on the day of the calculation.
Even when the village sleeps, I will not sleep because of you.
No matter who speaks, my story will always be about you.
Will the thoughts rise from my eyes and escape? Will they be caught before they fall?
What will happen if I kiss? What will happen to your sound?
I will light the lamp and look at your face on the day of the calculation.
I will light the lamp and look at your face on the day of the calculation.
That Indiran and Chandiran, my uncle should come and sit.
That rambai and the village should be offered to my uncle.
I should hug my uncle as a friend.
I will light the lamp and look at your face on the day of the calculation.
